mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( id, order_id, reviewer_id, reviewer_name, reviewee_id, reviewee_name, rating, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewerName}, #{revieweeId}, #{revieweeName}, #{rating}, #{content}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reviews WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE reviewee_id = #{revieweeId}
